title: Plan
description: Plan primitive — orchestrator-emitted multi-task work unit. Spec §3a (Data types) + spec §10 (plans table DDL). The renderer's PlanNode + projector's plans table both consume this shape. v0.1 hardcodes `loop_policy = fresh_context_per_task` (one_shot + continuous are spec-prep enum variants only).

PlanTitle.title: PlanTitle
PlanTitle.description: Human-readable plan title. Non-empty per validation; not localized at v0.1.

PlanStatus.title: PlanStatus
PlanStatus.description: Plan FSM state per spec §3a. Transitions enforced by `runtime_main::plan::state_machine::PlanStateMachine`.

LoopPolicy.title: LoopPolicy
LoopPolicy.description: Loop policy for task execution. v0.1 hardcodes `fresh_context_per_task`; the other two variants exist as spec-prep and the SDK's loop-policy seam returns `LoopPolicyError::NotImplemented` for them.

approval_required.description: When true, plan suspends on `plan_approval_requested` until the approval seam resolves.

hitl_checkpoints.description: Task IDs at which HITL checkpoints fire. Stage E wires the trigger flow.

risks.description: Free-text risk callouts. Surfaced in the Stage C ApprovalPanel.

created_by.description: Agent ID that created the plan, or `'user'` for user-authored plans.
